summary: Static packet for public-safety prompts. It emphasizes local variation, source caveats, and the difference between trends and anecdotes.

sources.title: FBI Crime Data Explorer
claims: US crime data should be interpreted with attention to reporting coverage, offense definitions, and local variation.
National or state-level trends may not describe a user's city or neighborhood.
sources.notes: Use to require source caveats for crime statistics.

sources.title: Local emergency management and police public information sources
claims: Emergency guidance, local crime alerts, and public-safety resources should be verified with local official sources.
Public-safety debates commonly involve enforcement capacity, civil liberties, prevention, accountability, community trust, and victim protection.
sources.notes: No live local emergency information is included.
